hero.label: FUTURE-READY DEVELOPMENT
hero.headline: High-Performance Web Applications for Your
hero.description: We build scalable web solutions and seamless API integrations designed to streamline your operations. Your vision, expertly engineered.

projects.title: Evola E-Bikes
projects.description: Electric bike and battery rental service in Wroclaw with full suspension and hardtail options, weekly service, and clear rental terms.

projects.title: Freedom Astana
projects.description: Comprehensive addiction treatment center in Astana offering detoxification, rehabilitation, psychotherapy, and long-term recovery support.

projects.title: Dobroe Serdce
projects.description: Private comfortable pension for elderly people in Astana providing 24/7 qualified care, medical supervision, and individual attention.

services.title: What we do
services.description1: From a single landing page to a full digital marketing stack — one team for every channel.
services.description2: Web development, design, SEO, social media, and paid ads. Custom scope, clean delivery, measurable results.
values: Custom scope — no generic templates pushed on you
Design, development, and marketing under one roof
GDPR-compliant delivery, SSL included on every project

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Landing pages, corporate sites, web apps, and e-commerce. Vue 3 + Nuxt frontend, Java Spring Boot backend, WordPress for content-driven sites.

items.title: Design
items.description: UI/UX in Figma, logo & brand identity, website redesigns, and print-ready materials. You always own the source files.

items.title: SEO
items.description: Technical audits, on-page optimisation, local SEO, content strategy, and backlink building. Clear monthly reporting.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Monthly content calendars, on-brand post design, copywriting, Stories & Reels, and community management for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

items.title: Contextual Ads
items.description: Google Search, Display, Shopping, Performance Max, and Meta Ads. You keep full account ownership. Monthly spend reports included.

items.title: Banners & Creatives
items.description: Static and animated banners for Google Display, Meta Ads, and web — all IAB sizes. GIF or HTML5 delivery in 2–4 business days.

workflow.title: Fast single-page websites without chaos.
workflow.subtitle: A structured process that keeps speed high, feedback clear, and your business goals in focus.
benefits: Design + SEO + marketing alignment from day one

steps.title: Rapid discovery
steps.description: We gather only essential inputs first: business goal, offer, audience, references, tone, and desired emotional impact.
steps.benefit: You avoid long questionnaires and get momentum immediately.

steps.title: Traffic and promotion planning
steps.description: We align expected traffic, SEO scope, promotion conditions, and budget. We also map SMM channels if needed.
steps.benefit: Your site is designed for real growth, not just visuals.

steps.title: Prototype and approval loop
steps.description: We build a fast concept in Stitch, present it, and iterate in short loops until direction is approved.
steps.benefit: You see results early and steer decisions with confidence.

steps.title: Content and assets integration
steps.description: After first layout approval, we collect photos, documents, and resources, then refine the design with real content.
steps.benefit: The final site looks polished and accurate to your brand.

steps.title: Build, review, and release
steps.description: We choose the right stack, develop from the approved visuals, present the working site, and finalize practical edits.
steps.benefit: Predictable delivery, clear scope, and smooth launch preparation.

steps.title: Domain, SEO, and marketing handoff
steps.description: Once visuals are finalized, we proceed with domain setup and complete SEO + marketing execution as the final stage.
steps.benefit: You launch with a ready-to-promote digital product.

about.title: About Our Company
about.description1: EvolaTech is more than a development agency; we are your technical partners. We believe that web software should be as enduring and precise as classical architecture.
about.description2: We focus on clean code and smart connectivity, helping companies bridge the gap between complex business logic and intuitive user experiences.

pricing.title: Simple, Scalable Plans
pricing.description: Choose the package that fits your goals. All plans include individual design, responsive layout, and fast delivery.

importantInfo.title: What to Know
items: Each package includes clear scope and measurable milestones
Page and revision limits ensure predictable delivery
E-Commerce plans limited to specific product counts
Advertising budgets are separate from package pricing
warnings: Landing Pages: fixed block limits per tier
Websites: page limits to maintain quality and timeline
E-Commerce: product limits to ensure performance
Ad budgets do not include campaign spend
Support periods vary — see tier details

contact.title: Let's build
contact.description: Ready to launch your web project? Get in touch for a technical consultation with our lead developers.

form.topicLabel: Tell us about your project or integration needs
form.successText: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.
form.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

footer.description: We design and build high-performing digital products with clear strategy, clean execution, and long-term support.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using our services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: Services
sections.body: EvolaTech provides IT consulting, custom software development, API integrations, cloud infrastructure setup, and ongoing technical support. All services are subject to a separate written agreement unless otherwise stated.

sections.heading: Payment Terms
sections.body: Invoices are due within 14 days of issuance unless agreed otherwise in writing. Late payments may incur interest at the statutory rate. Project commencement may require an upfront deposit as specified in the project agreement.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: Upon full payment, clients receive ownership of all custom deliverables created for them. EvolaTech retains the right to use general methodologies, frameworks, and non-client-specific know-how developed during the engagement.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.body: Either party may terminate an engagement with 30 days written notice. In the event of material breach, immediate termination is permitted. Fees for work completed up to the termination date remain due.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Poland. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of competent jurisdiction in Poland.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For questions regarding these terms, contact us at evolateam{'@'}gmail.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: EvolaTech is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.heading: Data Controller
sections.body: EvolaTech is the data controller responsible for your personal data. Contact: evolateam{'@'}gmail.com, Phone: +48 789 711 631.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you voluntarily provide when contacting us (name, email, phone, project details). We also collect technical data such as IP address and browser type via server logs for security purposes.

sections.heading: Legal Basis
sections.body: Processing is based on your consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)), the performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b)), and our legitimate interests in maintaining secure and functional services (Art. 6(1)(f)).

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described above, or as required by law. Contact enquiries are stored for up to 2 years unless a contract relationship follows.

sections.heading: Third Parties
sections.body: We do not sell your data. We may share data with trusted service providers (e.g. hosting and email) under data processing agreements. These providers are bound by confidentiality obligations.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, and object to the use of your data. You also have the right to data portability and to withdraw consent at any time.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at evolateam{'@'}gmail.com.

gdpr.title: GDPR
gdpr.intro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation), EvolaTech upholds the highest standards for protecting personal data.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to: access your personal data; rectify inaccurate data; request erasure ('right to be forgotten'); restrict or object to certain processing; receive your data in a portable format; and withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

sections.heading: How to Exercise Your Rights
sections.body: Submit your request in writing to evolateam{'@'}gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days. Identity verification may be required to protect your data.

sections.heading: Supervisory Authority
sections.body: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Polish supervisory authority: Urząd Ochrony Danych Osobowych (UODO), ul. Stawki 2, 00-193 Warsaw, Poland.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For GDPR-related requests, contact us at evolateam{'@'}gmail.com.
